cards.title: General Documents
cards.content:
• Cover Note (Purpose & 60-Day Validity)
• Certificate of Insurance (Motor Act)
• Endorsements (Making Changes)

cards.title: 1. Cover Note (CRITICAL)
cards.content: A temporary document proving cover has started while the policy is being prepared. Usually used in Motor/Marine.

cards.title: 2. Maximum Validity
cards.content: A Cover Note is valid for ONLY 60 DAYS from issuance. Policy must be issued within this period.

cards.title: 3. Certificate of Insurance
cards.content: Legally mandatory under Motor Vehicles Act, 1988. Proof for police that Third-Party Liability cover is active.

cards.title: 4. Endorsements
cards.content: Used for any changes/alterations to an active policy (e.g., address change, car transfer). Attached to the main policy.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Motor Legal Requirement: Certificate of Insurance.

cards.title: Q2. Method for modifying active policy?
